subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from the presence of God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, unto them that have hearkened to the Call and turned unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم لمن سمع الندآء و اقبل الی الافق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
